description: Style Note A brand known world over for its classic cuts and impeccable quality standards fcuk definitely delivers the goods with this T-shirt. Its pure cotton composition wicks away sweat lets you stay comfortable in Summer. Pair it with oxford shoes and crisp trousers for a look that exudes confidence. Product Details Black T-shirt, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves, back yoke and print in front Material and Care 100% cotton Wash with similar colours Iron on reverse Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
